headline: American Airlines Stock Rises on Report of United Merger Pitch. Can It Really Happen?
summary: American Airlines  stock jumped 8% early Tuesday following a report that  United Airlines  floated the idea of a merger in a meeting with government officials.  Airline mergers have been notoriously difficult to complete in recent years, and while it’s not impossible, UBS analysts said the chances of a deal materializing “are probably remote.”  The combined carrier would control around 40% of U.S. domestic capacity, with dominant shares in New York City, Chicago and Los Angeles, TD Cowen analyst Tom Fitzgerald said.

headline: American Airlines Stock Jumps 5%. United CEO Pitched a Merger, Report Says.
summary: American Airlines  stock jumped ahead of the open Tuesday following a report that  United Airlines  floated the idea of a merger in a meeting with government officials.  United CEO Scott Kirby pitched the idea of a potential tie-up to senior officials just days before the Iran war began, Bloomberg reported late Monday.  Shares of American jumped 4.9% to $11.78 in premarket trading Tuesday.

raw.headline: American Airlines Stock Jumps 5%. United CEO Pitched a Merger, Report Says.

United CEO Scott Kirby pitched the idea of a potential tie-up to senior officials just days before the Iran war began, Bloomberg reported late Monday.  Shares of American jumped 4.9% to $11.78 in premarket trading Tuesday.

headline: Amazon’s Kuiper Wi Fi And India Quick Commerce Shape Valuation Story
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) is partnering with Delta Air Lines to roll out satellite based in flight Wi Fi using Project Kuiper, marking Kuiper’s first major commercial deployment. At the same time, Amazon is expanding its presence in India’s quick commerce space, adding more dark stores as competition and order volumes in the segment increase. For investors watching NasdaqGS:AMZN, these moves sit outside the familiar core of e commerce and cloud services. In flight connectivity and ultra...
